_note: Verified against the official spec at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/anthropics/dxt/refs/heads/main/MANIFEST.md (MCPB/DXT MANIFEST.md, spec version 0.3, dated 2025-12-02). The current spec uses the top-level field name `manifest_version` (the older `@anthropic-ai/dxt` examples used `dxt_version`); `manifest_version: "0.3"` is used here per the verified spec. user_config values are injected into the server env via `${user_config.KEY}` template literals, and `${__dirname}` resolves to the unpacked extension directory. Claude Desktop spawns this process locally, so the stdio transport is used (no TDMCP_TRANSPORT override).
name: tdmcp
description: AI-native visual creation for TouchDesigner — build real node networks from plain language.

TDMCP_TD_HOST.title: TouchDesigner host
TDMCP_TD_HOST.description: Hostname/IP of the TouchDesigner Web Server DAT bridge. Use 127.0.0.1 when TouchDesigner runs on this machine.

TDMCP_TD_PORT.title: TouchDesigner port
TDMCP_TD_PORT.description: Port of the TouchDesigner Web Server DAT bridge (must match the bridge's port).
